taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Data Analysis, Data Scientist
core_skills: Business Intelligence, Data modeling, Data visualization, ETL, SQL
skill_match_scores: Business Intelligence:0.0, Data modeling:1.0, Data visualization:1.0, ETL:1.0, SQL:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in BI, finance, engineering, statistics, computer science, mathematics, finance or equivalent quantitative field, 3+ years of analyzing and interpreting data with Redshift, Oracle, NoSQL etc. experience, Experience with data visualization using Tableau, Quicksight, or similar tools, Experience writing complex SQL queries, Experience using SQL to pull data from a database or data warehouse and scripting experience (Python) to process data for modeling, Experience in data warehouse technical architectures, data modeling, infrastructure components, ETL/ ELT and reporting/analytic tools and environments, data structures and hands-on SQL coding
preferred_quals: Experience working directly with business stakeholders to translate between data and business needs, Experience managing, analyzing and communicating results to senior leadership
core_responsibilities: Help identify complex business problems, recognize opportunities, and implement solutions to improve operations and finance-facing systems, processes, and tools, Provide technical expertise in extracting, integrating, and analyzing critical data, clearly communicate any potential discrepancies and/or reporting downtime, including specific root causes and steps to resolution, and design and develop key performance metrics and indicators, Build innovative data solutions with large-scale systems, identify high-priority work and projects that maximize results for key stakeholders, and solve complex problems that impact company-wide strategic decisions, Help automate processes by developing deep-dive tools, metrics, and dashboards to communicate these insights in real-time to business teams, Take detailed requirements from stakeholders to deeply understand their current manual processes and pain points, Think creatively to identify opportunities to solve problems using technology-driven solutions, Design and implement optimal automation solutions to address stakeholder needs, Respond to ad hoc requests and provide support as needed, Thoroughly document all processes, solutions, and learnings to ensure knowledge capture and sharing
job_summary: Amazon is seeking a Business Intelligence (BI) Engineer to join their Rapid & Rural Logistics (R2L) Analytics Team. The role focuses on providing metrics and operational insights to stakeholders, driving operational excellence, and improving customer experience while supporting strategic business decisions.
